## Target agent / environment

Name and link to the official documentation.

## Why this adapter is worth adding

Briefly explain who would use this and what makes the platform meaningfully different from the four already supported (Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, Trae).

## Concept mapping draft

If you can already fill in the table, please do. Mark "not supported" where the platform lacks an equivalent.

| skills/ directory |  |
| rules.md |  |
| state/ directory |  |
| Quick command |  |
| Scheduling Lv1 |  |

## Are you planning to submit a PR yourself?

- [ ] Yes, I will open a PR.
- [ ] No, I am just requesting.

## Additional context

Anything else relevant.
